name: public_health_staffing_model_assigns_northpine_st_lt
premise: A Public Health response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving public health staffing model assigns northpine st lt. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next shift change. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as short term vs long term under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Talia Diallo
agents.identity: I am Talia Diallo, accountable for a defensible call in Public Health when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays long term for short term.

agents.name: Hector Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Hector Alvarez, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Public Health.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so long term isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of short term.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect long term.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to long term to secure short term under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next shift change. Evidence is partial. Talia Diallo must decide under short term vs long term. What does Talia Diallo do?
